name: drizzle-resource-workspace
description: Workspace root for drizzle-resource packages and docs

scripts.typecheck: vp run @drizzle-resource/core#typecheck && vp run @drizzle-resource/zod#typecheck && vp run @drizzle-resource/valibot#typecheck && vp run drizzle-resource#typecheck
scripts.build: vp run @drizzle-resource/core#build && vp run @drizzle-resource/zod#build && vp run @drizzle-resource/valibot#build && vp run drizzle-resource#build
scripts.check: vp run @drizzle-resource/core#check && vp run @drizzle-resource/zod#check && vp run @drizzle-resource/valibot#check && vp run drizzle-resource#check
scripts.ci: bun run check && bun run docs:build
